message: Hi there! What brings you to the high school today?
Hey! I'm just here for a quick meeting. How about you?
I was just heading to the library to return some books. They have a great collection here.
Nice! Maybe I'll check it out sometime. Any recommendations?
Definitely! They have a fantastic section on science fiction. You should give it a look.
Thanks for the tip! See you around.
See you! Have a good day.

actions.title: Find the guidance counsellor's office
actions.description: You can click or select doors to move between rooms.
